_comment: The RELEASE template's pinned shape (github.com/Digiata/Stadium-Builder). This is one of two per-target recipes — the release version is judged against THIS file, never against dev's. Confirmed against release v1.1.0 live values on 2026-07-17. After a release-template change, run `QA_TARGET=release npm run reconcile` to see what to update here.
